name: Firich Enterprises Co., Ltd.
summary: Firich Enterprises Co., Ltd. engages in the design and manufacture of POS systems worldwide. The company offers XPOS and mobile POS products; POS and BOX systems; lite, fanless, and performance panel PCs; monitors; kiosks; and peripherals. It provides POS solutions for the hospitality and retail markets. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
